div.class: d-none position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 bg-white bg-opacity-75 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center

div.p: Please do not refresh the page.
Create and manage your AI-powered Request for Proposals
Start your first AI-powered RFP project

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: This will create a copy and use AI to pre-fill answers from your existing project. This may take 1-2 minutes.

input.placeholder: Enter name for the new project

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: Upload a PDF or DOCX file and our AI will extract key information to pre-populate your new project.

div.class: alert alert-light border py-2 px-3 mb-0 d-flex align-items-center
alert alert-danger py-2 px-3 mb-0 small

input.placeholder: Leave blank to auto-detect from document

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: Our AI is reading your document, extracting information, and pre-filling answers. This may take 1-2 minutes.
div.small: Please do not close this window.

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: Describe your idea and let AI guide you through the requirements gathering

div.label: Initial Description *

textarea.name: description
textarea.placeholder: Describe your project goals, key features, and any specific requirements...

div.small: Our AI will analyze this and guide you through detailed questions

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: Upload a PDF or DOCX file and our AI will extract key information to pre-populate your new project.

div.class: alert alert-light border py-2 px-3 mb-0 d-flex align-items-center
alert alert-danger py-2 px-3 mb-0 small

input.placeholder: Leave blank to auto-detect from document

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: Our AI is reading your document, extracting information, and pre-filling answers. This may take 1-2 minutes.
div.small: Please do not close this window.

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle
mb-4 p-4 bg-white rounded shadow-sm rfp-input-group position-relative rfp-hover-card

label.class: form-label fw-bold mb-0 text-dark flex-grow-1 me-3 text-wrap d-flex align-items-center

div.class: mb-3 px-3 py-2 bg-light border-start border-3 border-info bg-opacity-50 text-muted rounded-end

t.t-value: 'email' if (input_field.data_type == 'email' or (input_field.field_key and 'email' in input_field.field_key.lower())) else ('tel' if (input_field.data_type == 'phone' or (input_field.field_key and ('phone' in input_field.field_key.lower() or 'mobile' in input_field.field_key.lower()))) else 'text')

input.title: Please enter a valid phone number
Please enter a valid email address (e.g., name@domain.com)

t.t-value: opt['value'] if isinstance(opt, dict) else opt
opt['label'] if isinstance(opt, dict) else opt
opt['value'] if isinstance(opt, dict) else opt
opt['label'] if isinstance(opt, dict) else opt

input.t-att-required: 'required' if (not input_field.depends_on or input_field.depends_on == '{}') else False

small.class: d-flex align-items-center mb-2 text-uppercase fw-bold text-muted

div.class: btn-suggestion p-3 rounded-3 position-relative d-flex align-items-start gap-3 shadow-sm

i.class: fa fa-quote-left text-black-50 opacity-50 mt-1 flex-shrink-0

div.class: mt-3 p-2 bg-warning bg-opacity-10 border border-warning rounded d-none irrelevant-box
div.label: Why is this irrelevant?

input.placeholder: e.g. We don't need this feature...

div.class: mt-3 p-2 bg-info bg-opacity-10 border border-info rounded d-none custom-answer-box
div.label: Custom Answer

div.class: bg-rfp-gold-light rounded-circle p-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

t.t-value: len(rfp_project.form_input_ids.filtered(lambda i: i.user_value or i.is_irrelevant)) + len(rfp_project.practice_input_ids.filtered(lambda i: i.user_value or i.is_irrelevant))

div.style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(212,175,55,0.08), rgba(212,175,55,0.15)); border-left: 4px solid var(--rfp-gold) !important;
div.small: These were extracted automatically. You can undo any to re-answer manually.

button.title: Clear this answer to re-answer manually

div.p: The AI service is experiencing high traffic. Please wait 30 seconds before retrying.
Reference:

t.div: The AI has analyzed your project and needs a few more details.

t.t-elif: not questions_to_answer and ai_status != 'rate_limit' and not is_generating

div.p: All current questions have been answered. Proceed to the next phase.

button.class: btn btn-rfp-gold btn-lg py-3 shadow mt-2

div.p: We're autonomously building your RFP document. This involves structuring, writing, and designing.

li.class: list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center border-0 py-3
list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center border-0 py-3
list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center border-0 py-3

div.p: Initializing...

div.class: alert alert-info d-flex align-items-center mb-4 py-2
card-header bg-white d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center py-3

div.p: No evaluation criteria yet. Generate criteria based on your project requirements.

div.t-att-class: 'alert-success' if eval_total_weight == 100 else ('alert-danger' if eval_total_weight > 100 else 'alert-warning')

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-{{ 'primary' if c.category == 'technical' else ('success' if c.category == 'commercial' else ('info' if c.category == 'experience' else ('warning' if c.category == 'compliance' else 'secondary'))) }}

textarea.placeholder: What constitutes high, medium, and low scores...

i.class: fa fa-spinner fa-spin fa-2x text-rfp-gold mb-3

div.p: Criteria interview is in progress.

div.class: card-header bg-white d-flex align-items-center gap-3 p-3 handle

input.class: form-control form-control-lg fw-bold border-0 bg-transparent section-title-input

div.class: card-img-top bg-secondary text-white d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
position-absolute top-0 end-0 p-2 d-flex gap-1

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light text-primary shadow-sm btn-ai-edit-diagram
button.title: Edit with AI

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light text-danger shadow-sm btn-delete-diagram
button.title: Delete Image

div.class: card-header bg-white d-flex align-items-center gap-3 p-3 handle

input.class: form-control form-control-lg fw-bold border-0 bg-transparent section-title-input

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: This will create a copy and use AI to pre-fill answers from your existing project. This may take 1-2 minutes.

input.placeholder: Enter name for the new project

div.p: Locking the document will prevent further edits. you can unlock it later but it is better to finish everything before locking.
This action cannot be undone.
Describe how you want to modify the content:

textarea.placeholder: E.g., Make it more formal, add bullet points, focus on security aspects...

div.p: Download your RFP export:

The download link will no longer be accessible.
Existing proposals will be preserved.

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

h2.style: color: var(--rfp-dark); border-left: 4px solid var(--rfp-gold); padding-left: 1rem;
color: var(--rfp-dark); border-left: 4px solid var(--rfp-gold); padding-left: 1rem;

div.p:
proposal(s) received
| Published:

div.small: Define how proposals are scored and ranked

div.class: card-header bg-white d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center py-3

div.p: Define the document types that must be uploaded with the proposals. When no documents are configured, proposals see a single generic file upload.

div.class: alert alert-success mb-4 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between

div.span: Upload proposals received from vendors for AI analysis and scoring

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-{{ 'success' if proposal.status == 'accepted' else ('warning' if proposal.status in ['reviewing', 'shortlisted'] else ('danger' if proposal.status == 'rejected' else 'secondary')) }}

div.p: Upload vendor proposals above to start the AI analysis
For: | Submitted:

span.t-attf-class: badge fs-5 bg-{{ 'success' if proposal.status == 'accepted' else ('warning' if proposal.status in ['reviewing', 'shortlisted'] else ('danger' if proposal.status == 'rejected' else 'secondary')) }}

div.p: This proposal was submitted without a file.

i.class: fa fa-cog fa-spin fa-3x text-muted mb-3

div.p:
Our AI is analyzing this proposal against your RFP requirements.
This typically takes 1-2 minutes.
An error occurred during analysis. Please try again later.

h2.t-attf-class: mb-0 text-{{ 'success' if analysis.get('coverage_score', 0) >= 70 else ('warning' if analysis.get('coverage_score', 0) >= 50 else 'danger') }}

h4.t-attf-class: mb-0 text-{{ 'success' if analysis.get('overall_rating') == 'Excellent' else ('primary' if analysis.get('overall_rating') == 'Good' else ('warning' if analysis.get('overall_rating') == 'Fair' else 'danger')) }}
mb-0 text-{{ 'success' if analysis.get('recommendation') == 'Shortlist' else ('warning' if analysis.get('recommendation') == 'Review' else 'danger') }}

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-{{ 'success' if item.get('impact') == 'High' else ('warning' if item.get('impact') == 'Medium' else 'secondary') }} ms-1
badge bg-{{ 'danger' if item.get('severity') == 'Critical' else ('warning' if item.get('severity') == 'Major' else 'secondary') }} ms-1

div.t-attf-class: alert-{{ 'success' if analysis.get('risk_assessment', {}).get('level') == 'Low' else ('warning' if analysis.get('risk_assessment', {}).get('level') == 'Medium' else 'danger') }}

div.p: AI analysis requires a proposal document.

div.span: — Tell us what matters most when evaluating proposals

t.div: Help us understand your evaluation priorities so we can create a tailored scoring rubric.

div.p: Generating your evaluation criteria...
— Review and adjust the scoring rubric

div.t-att-class: 'alert-success' if total_weight == 100 else ('alert-warning' if abs(total_weight - 100) <= 10 else 'alert-danger')

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-{{ 'primary' if c.category == 'technical' else ('success' if c.category == 'commercial' else ('info' if c.category == 'experience' else ('warning' if c.category == 'compliance' else 'secondary'))) }}

textarea.placeholder: What constitutes high, medium, and low scores...

div.class: mx-auto mb-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded-circle

div.p: Upload proposal documents for AI analysis and scoring

div.class: alert alert-warning d-flex align-items-start mb-3 py-2 px-3

div.small: No evaluation criteria set up yet
Define scoring criteria to let AI evaluate and rank proposals automatically.

i.class: fa fa-spinner fa-spin fa-3x text-rfp-gold mb-3

div.p: Our AI is extracting vendor info and scoring the proposal. This may take 1-2 minutes.
